positive: A minimalist, sophisticated illustration featuring a stylized celestial map. The main subject is a vibrant crescent moon cradling a cluster of geometric constellation lines and stars. Use a clean, elegant silhouette style with strong, saturated colors of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and pops of ethereal gold and silver. The composition should be centrally framed and highly contrasting, designed to look excellent on clothing. Integrate stylized astronomical elements like planetary orbits and abstract cosmic dust clouds. Graphic, vector-art quality, high detail, suitable for a wearable print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, messy, photographic, photo-realistic, 3d render, graffiti, dirt, scratches
